title: cissus anamalayana
intro: Cissus anamalayana, also known as the Indian vine or Anamalai creeper, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grape family (Vitaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cissus anamalayana include its potential to improve bone health, reduce joint pain and inflammation, and support the treatment of various diseases. Cissus anamalayana is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and osteoporosis.
